name: Cheeseburgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Form the beef into 6 patties, about 1/2-inch thick.
2. Sprinkle each patty with salt and brush lightly with a mixture of equal parts brown bouquet sauce and water if a deep brown color is desired.
3. Arrange the patties in a circle in a paper towel-lined, shallow, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish, avoiding placing any patties in the center of the circle. Cover with paper towels and microwave for 5 minutes.
4. Turn the patties over. If desired, brush again with the brown bouquet mixture.
5. Microwave uncovered for an additional minute. The burgers will be rare. Continue microwaving for an additional 1 to 2 minutes for medium or well-done cooking.
6. Place one patty on each hamburger bun and top each burger with a slice of cheese. Arrange the burgers on a heat-resistant, non-metallic serving platter and microwave uncovered for 2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
